_comment:
Device / endpoint / availability data is NOT in Jira. Provide it here (from Intune, Defender/agent status, and platform monitoring) and pass with --supplemental. Omit any section to show a 'provided separately' placeholder. Meter rows are [label, achieved, total, kind] where kind is one of ok|warn|bad|blue. 'commentary' is the analyst's written read on the week, shown under the executive summary; wrap paragraphs in

…

and use for emphasis.
commentary:
A steadier week overall. Alert volume rose on the back of a phishing wave targeting finance mailboxes — all quarantined at the gateway, none reached inboxes.

The one item worth your attention: NSO-4821, outbound C2 beaconing blocked at the WAF. The affected host is isolated and under review; no data movement was observed.

device.note: 3 endpoints outstanding (macOS, with client); 3 behind on OS updates — scheduled through Intune this week.
